summary: Skeptical verifier confirms 5 forced biology-source hits (pubmed 25929799, jcs vernalization, plphys winter memory, springer brassica, pnas 0808687105) plus 1 judgment hit (nature10241 Polycomb-switch) — total 6 hits vs 07_hit_miss's 18. Round 07 over-counted via lenient agent-judgment on adjacent LLM-memory and broad epigenetic-analogy items. Novelty claim survives more strongly under strict reading: vernalization-specific FLC-PRC2-H3K27me3 import to LLM agent commitment is not directly anticipated.
